title: Powerful Neth sword
description: This Packs adds a new Netherite sword texture to make it look more menacing
body:
This pack is changing the Netherite sword to look more powerful it also changing the color if the sword is enchanted with the knockback enchantment_(This Feature only works if you have the Mod CIT Reswen installed!) _
[CIT Reswen Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)

**The pack changes follwing things about the sword:**
- Item laying on floor animation
- Texture 32x 
- animated
- color changing depending on enchant
- bigger in hands
- and bigger in First person
